template.description: This template is an example of how to configure and use the Publish and Consume JMS processors.
template.name: Publish Consume JMS

value.description: A fully qualified name of the JMS ConnectionFactory implementation class (i.e., org.apache.activemq.ActiveMQConnectionFactory)
value.name: cf

value.description: Path to the directory with additional resources (i.e., JARs, configuration files etc.) to be added to the classpath. Such resources typically represent target MQ client libraries for the ConnectionFactory implementation.
value.name: cflib

value.description: URI pointing to the network location of the JMS Message broker. For example, 'tcp://myhost:61616' for ActiveMQ or 'myhost:1414' for IBM MQ
value.name: broker

value.description: The SSL Context Service used to provide client certificate information for TLS/SSL connections.
value.name: SSL Context Service

value.description: User Name used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: User Name

value.description: Password used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: Password

value.description: The name of the JMS Destination. Usually provided by the administrator (e.g., 'topic://myTopic').
value.name: Destination Name

value.description: The type of the JMS Destination. Could be one of 'QUEUE' or 'TOPIC'. Usually provided by the administrator. Defaults to 'TOPIC
value.name: Destination Type

value.description: The maximum limit for the number of cached Sessions.
value.name: Session Cache size

value.description: The Controller Service that is used to obtain ConnectionFactory
value.name: Connection Factory Service

value.description: User Name used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: User Name

value.description: Password used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: Password

value.description: The name of the JMS Destination. Usually provided by the administrator (e.g., 'topic://myTopic').
value.name: Destination Name

value.description: The type of the JMS Destination. Could be one of 'QUEUE' or 'TOPIC'. Usually provided by the administrator. Defaults to 'TOPIC
value.name: Destination Type

value.description: The maximum limit for the number of cached Sessions.
value.name: Session Cache size

value.description: The Controller Service that is used to obtain ConnectionFactory
value.name: Connection Factory Service

value.description: User Name used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: User Name

value.description: Password used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: Password

value.description: The name of the JMS Destination. Usually provided by the administrator (e.g., 'topic://myTopic').
value.name: Destination Name

value.description: The type of the JMS Destination. Could be one of 'QUEUE' or 'TOPIC'. Usually provided by the administrator. Defaults to 'TOPIC
value.name: Destination Type

value.description: The maximum limit for the number of cached Sessions.
value.name: Session Cache size

value.description: The Controller Service that is used to obtain ConnectionFactory
value.name: Connection Factory Service

relationships.description: All FlowFiles that are received from the JMS Destination are routed to this relationship
relationships.name: success

value.description: The size of the file that will be used
value.name: File Size

value.description: The number of FlowFiles to be transferred in each invocation
value.name: Batch Size

value.description: Specifies whether the data should be Text or Binary
value.name: Data Format

value.description: If true, each FlowFile that is generated will be unique. If false, a random value will be generated and all FlowFiles will get the same content but this offers much higher throughput
value.name: Unique FlowFiles

value.description: User Name used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: User Name

value.description: Password used for authentication and authorization.
value.name: Password

value.description: The name of the JMS Destination. Usually provided by the administrator (e.g., 'topic://myTopic').
value.name: Destination Name

value.description: The type of the JMS Destination. Could be one of 'QUEUE' or 'TOPIC'. Usually provided by the administrator. Defaults to 'TOPIC
value.name: Destination Type

value.description: The maximum limit for the number of cached Sessions.
value.name: Session Cache size

value.description: The Controller Service that is used to obtain ConnectionFactory
value.name: Connection Factory Service

relationships.description: All FlowFiles that cannot be sent to JMS destination are routed to this relationship
relationships.name: failure

relationships.description: All FlowFiles that are sent to the JMS destination are routed to this relationship
relationships.name: success

value.description: The Log Level to use when logging the Attributes
value.name: Log Level

value.description: If true, the FlowFile's payload will be logged, in addition to its attributes; otherwise, just the Attributes will be logged.
value.name: Log Payload

value.description: A comma-separated list of Attributes to Log. If not specified, all attributes will be logged.
value.name: Attributes to Log

value.description: A comma-separated list of Attributes to ignore. If not specified, no attributes will be ignored.
value.name: Attributes to Ignore

value.description: Log prefix appended to the log lines. It helps to distinguish the output of multiple LogAttribute processors.
value.name: Log prefix

relationships.description: All FlowFiles are routed to this relationship
relationships.name: success
